ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Aug-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Crisostomo Ibarra for and with (petitioner) Yu Yi Wei.

The Court stated that an Inventory & Appraisal was filed in July but there was no attachment #1 that that it also needs status on filing a Petition for Final Distribution. Mr. Ibarra responded that it was filed and produced a non file stamped copy of a document that was handed to the Court. The Court stated that there is no attachment #1. Mr. Ibarra stated that it is just a settlement check that attorney Mr. Hughes received and provided additional documents to the court for review. The Court stated that this is what was filed in 2014 and that we need the final inventory up to date. Mr. Ibarra stated that there is only the $18,000.00 distributed to Mr. Hughes. The Court stated that it needs an attachment showing what happened from the personal representative and not the attorney who filed the lawsuit against the estate, that it needs the attachment even if it is the same as the claim and asked if they are ready to close the estate. Mr. Ibarra needed clarification on what needed to be filed. The Court stated that he needs an attachment regarding the distribution, prompted him to look at page 3 of his filing and that there is no exhibit #1 attached. Mr. Ibarra stated that it is in the other document. The Court responded that when you say something is attached it must be attached and that formalities matter in Court. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal, a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to August 8, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Yu Yi Wei For Approval Of Contingent Fee Contract.
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Crisostomo Ibarra for and with Yu Wei.

The Court waived notice. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Contigent Fee Contract (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.

Petition Of Yu Yi Wei For Approval Of Contingent Fee Contract.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Continued To Apr-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Crisostomo Ibarra for and with Yu Yi Wei.

Mr. Ibarra stated that he filed a supplemental declaration this morning addressing the issues raised by the Probate Examiner (copy provided to the Court). The Petition for Letters of Administration will be continued and the temporary letters will be extended to a date to be determined by the Court once the declaration is reviewed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.
